name: test_copy_message_to_clipboard
description:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

        Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
        the copied content matches the actual message text.
descriptionHtml:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

    Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
    the copied content matches the actual message text.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request that needs to be copied....
  Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request that needs to be copied....
assert "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request that needs to be copied.\n\nCould you please provide:\nThe message or text you'd like me to copy\nAny specific formatting or modifications you need\nThe destination or purpose for the copied content\n\nOnce you share the message, I'll assist you accordingly." == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request that needs to be copied.\nCould you please provide:\nThe message or text you'd like me to copy\nAny specific formatting or modifications you need\nThe destination or purpose for the copied content\nOnce you share the message, I'll assist you accordingly."
  
    I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request that needs to be copied.
  + 
    Could you please provide:
    The message or text you'd like me to copy
    Any specific formatting or modifications you need
    The destination or purpose for the copied content
  + 
    Once you share the message, I'll assist you accordingly.
statusTrace:
tests/ui/chat/test_chat_interface.py:213: in test_copy_message_to_clipboard
    assert _strip_markdown(clipboard_text) == ai_response_text.strip(), (
E   AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
E     Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request that needs to be copied....
E     Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request that needs to be copied....

However, I don't see any message content in your request that needs to be copied.\n\nCould you please provide:\nThe message or text you'd like me to copy\nAny specific formatting or modifications you need\nThe destination or purpose for the copied content\n\nOnce you share the message, I'll assist you accordingly." == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request that needs to be copied.\nCould you please provide:\nThe message or text you'd like me to copy\nAny specific formatting or modifications you need\nThe destination or purpose for the copied content\nOnce you share the message, I'll assist you accordingly."
